name: fireside
description: Fireside Strategies — internal tools. Publish and manage deals on the live investor portal.

plugins.name: fireside-publish
plugins.description: Add and manage deals on the live Fireside portal — structured authoring with built-in guardrails; a bundled Node tool validates against the real finance engine and commits to the repo (Vercel auto-deploys). GitHub token set once in config.json; no MCP server.
